title: leucanthemum vulgare var. ageratifolium
intro: Leucanthemum vulgare var. ageratifolium, also known as the Oxford dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Leucanthemum vulgare var. ageratifolium include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
